title: Data leak investigation
description: Investigate a suspected data leak involving potentially sensitive operational data from an energy-sector environment.
notes: Initial triage indicates possible external exposure through a shared repository. Prioritize scoping and evidence preservation.

tasks_template.title: Validate data leak alert
tasks_template.description: Confirm the alert source, leak claim, and initial credibility before broad escalation.

notes.note: Capture the original alert payload and timestamp. Avoid modifying any external source content.

tasks_template.title: Preserve evidence and access logs
tasks_template.description: Collect relevant logs and preserve artifacts to support forensic review and legal traceability.

notes.note: Record chain-of-custody details for all exported evidence files.

tasks_template.title: Determine exposed data scope
tasks_template.description: Identify what data categories were exposed, estimate volume, and assess confidentiality impact.

notes.note: Classify records by sensitivity (public, internal, confidential, regulated) for reporting.

tasks_template.title: Contain leak vectors
tasks_template.description: Disable or restrict the channels causing exposure and revoke risky credentials or sharing links.

notes.note: Coordinate with platform owners before disabling production integrations.

tasks_template.title: Notify stakeholders and legal
tasks_template.description: Notify data owners, legal, and compliance contacts based on jurisdictional and contractual obligations.

notes.note: Track who was notified, when, and by which approved communication channel.

tasks_template.title: Produce investigation report and lessons learned
tasks_template.description: Document root cause, impacted data, remediation actions, and follow-up controls.

notes.note: Include clear actions with owners and due dates so follow-up can be tracked.
